proactive.name: Proactive
proactive.description: Double CRITICAL DAMAGE if an enemy is at full health.

nearsighted.name: Nearsighted
nearsighted.description: Bonus DAMAGE to enemies at point-blank range.

assassin.name: Assassin
assassin.description: Temporarily increase MOVEMENT SPEED after getting a point blank kill.

lucky.name: Lucky
lucky.description: Critical hits have a chance of returning MANA.
